quotes.text: The best marketing strategy for a developer is to actually ship something useful and let people find it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: SEO is the art of making your website slightly less terrible so Google tolerates showing it to people.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: SEO is a long game. If you want results today, run ads. If you want results in 6 months, write content.
quotes.author: based
